name: edumanager-ai
description: EduManager AI - Full Stack School Management System (MCA Project)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.postinstall: echo '\n✅ Root dependencies installed. Run: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install'

author: MCA Student
